title: HEYMKGO 14 Pcs Professional Barber Hair Comb Set for Men & Women, Hair Cutting Kit with Wide Tooth Comb, Rat Tail Comb, Clipper Brush, Neck Duster, Styling Clips for Salon Grooming Tools (Black A)
features: 【Salon-Quality Grooming Kit】Essential 14-piece barber comb set includes 2 wide tooth combs (with/without handle), flat top comb, clipper comb, teasing comb, rat tail comb, taper Comb, 4 double-sided cutting combs, fade brush, neck duster, sectioning clips – perfect for professional stylists and home use

【Durable Premium Materials】This sleek barber set is crafted from high-quality ABS plastic, metal, and wood, ensuring long-lasting performance. The ultra-soft nylon barber duster bristles are gentle on the skin, while the lightweight yet unbreakable design offers both flexibility and strength. Built to withstand daily salon use, it’s a must-have for barbershops and professional stylists

【Multi-Functional Cutting & Styling Set】Create flawless fades, layers, and blowouts with precision tools: the wide tooth comb detangles effortlessly, rat tail comb sections hair precisely, and teasing comb adds volume. Use the sectioning clips and dual-sided cutting comb for versatile styling, while the barber clipper brush and duster brush efficiently clean up hair debris from scissors and necklines

【Static-Free & Travel-Friendly Design】These anti-static combs ensure smooth styling even during dry winter months. Featuring lightweight construction with anti-slip grips and a compact case, this set is perfect for mobile hairdressers, barbershops, and home grooming kits

【Perfect Gift for Hair Enthusiasts】These professional barber tools are a must-have for all hair types and skill levels, from beginners to experts. Designed for effortless styling, they make an ideal gift for barbers, beard groomers, Afro hair specialists, or DIY haircut enthusiasts
